input.title: Hotel Booking Platform
input.description: Hotel Booking Platform is a web-based enterprise platform that centralizes operational workflows, data visibility, and cross-functional reporting.

user_classes.Admin: Configures the system, manages users, and oversees permissions and settings.
user_classes.Manager: Oversees departmental workflows, approvals, KPIs, and operational reporting.
user_classes.Employee: Performs day-to-day operational tasks within assigned modules and permissions.
user_classes.User: Generic authenticated platform user with access limited by role and department.

definitions.Admin: System user with full administrative privileges.
definitions.Manager: Operational owner of a department, module, or workflow.
definitions.Employee: End user performing role-specific business operations.

constraints: Initial release will focus on the web platform only
Role-based access control is mandatory across all modules
Operational data must be auditable and retained according to policy

operating_environment.frontend: Web-based interface built with Vue.js and accessible through modern browsers.
operating_environment.backend: Service layer implemented with Laravel, MySQL for business operations.
operating_environment.deployment: Cloud-hosted environment with centralized monitoring, backups, and automated deployments.

NFR-01.title: Security and Access Control
requirements: All sensitive data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
Role-based authorization must restrict access by module and action
All authentication events and privileged actions must be logged

NFR-02.title: Performance and Scalability
requirements: Core pages and dashboards should load within acceptable enterprise SLAs
The platform must support concurrent usage across multiple departments
Background jobs and reporting workloads should not block transactional workflows

NFR-03.title: Reliability and Recoverability
requirements: Automated backups must run on a defined schedule
Critical workflows should support retry-safe processing and audit logging
Operational alerts should be generated for failures and degraded services

system_attributes.reliability: Platform should provide resilient transactional processing with backup and recovery capabilities.
system_attributes.scalability: Architecture should support horizontal scaling for APIs, background workers, and reporting services.
system_attributes.security: Authentication, authorization, encryption, and auditability must be built into every module.
system_attributes.maintainability: Codebase should remain modular, observable, and safe to extend through clear service boundaries.

out_of_scope: Native mobile applications in the first release
Large third-party marketplace or legacy ERP migrations unless explicitly scoped
Non-core experimental modules outside the platform's operational workflows

FR-01.title: Hotel Search and Filters
requirements: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests
Filter by price range, star rating, amenities
Sort by price, rating, distance from center
Map view showing hotel locations

FR-02.title: Room Reservation
requirements: View room types with photos, amenities, and prices
Select room and complete booking
System checks room availability in real-time
Booking confirmation sent via email

FR-03.title: Guest Profile and Preferences
requirements: Store guest preferences for room type and amenities
Save frequent guest details for faster booking
Loyalty points system for repeat customers
View booking history

FR-04.title: Payment and Invoice
requirements: Pay via credit card, PayPal, or bank transfer
Partial payment with deposit option
Generate detailed invoice with tax breakdown
Automated refund on cancellation within policy

FR-05.title: Booking Cancellation and Modification
requirements: Cancel booking per cancellation policy
Modify dates or room type if available
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in
Cancellation fees apply within 48 hours

FR-06.title: Hotel Owner Property Management
requirements: Add property with details, photos, and room types
Set pricing per room type with seasonal rates
Manage room inventory and availability calendar
View booking reports and revenue

FR-07.title: Guest Review System
requirements: Guests can rate hotel after checkout
Rate cleanliness, service, location, value separately
Write text review with optional photos
Hotel can respond to reviews

FR-08.title: Check-in and Check-out
requirements: Online check-in available 24 hours before arrival
Generate digital room key via app
Express check-out with email receipt
Late check-out request option

FR-01.title: Design Hotel Search and Filters UI
FR-01.description: Design the user interface for hotel search and filters. Create the screens, forms, dashboards, or status views needed by the SRS and make the workflow clear, responsive, and accessible for the target users.
acceptance_criteria: UI design for hotel search and filters is complete and reviewable.
The hotel search and filters design is responsive and accessible.
The design for hotel search and filters aligns with the documented user flow and validation states.

FR-01.title: Frontend Implementation of Hotel Search and Filters
FR-01.description: Implement the frontend behavior for hotel search and filters. Build the required user interactions, validation states, loading states, and error handling so the interface supports these behaviors: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests; Filter by price range, star rating, amenities; Sort by price, rating, distance from center.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend implements the required hotel search and filters user interactions.
Validation, loading, and error states for hotel search and filters are handled in the UI.
Frontend behavior for hotel search and filters is integrated correctly with backend APIs.

FR-01.title: Backend Implementation of Hotel Search and Filters
FR-01.description: Implement the backend logic for hotel search and filters. Build the required APIs, business rules, validation, permissions, persistence, and processing needed to support these behaviors: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests; Filter by price range, star rating, amenities; Sort by price, rating, distance from center.
acceptance_criteria: Backend logic for hotel search and filters is implemented and testable.
APIs and business rules for hotel search and filters enforce validation and security requirements.
Data handling for hotel search and filters is reliable and supports the required workflow.

FR-01.title: Testing Hotel Search and Filters Functionality
FR-01.description: Create and execute tests for hotel search and filters. Cover the main success flows, failure scenarios, permission checks, validation rules, integrations, and operational edge cases described in the SRS so the implementation is safe to release.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover the main success and failure scenarios for hotel search and filters.
Security, validation, and permission checks for hotel search and filters are verified.
Regression coverage exists for the most important hotel search and filters behaviors.

FR-02.title: Backend Implementation of Room Reservation
FR-02.description: Implement the backend logic for room reservation. Build the required APIs, business rules, validation, permissions, persistence, and processing needed to support these behaviors: View room types with photos, amenities, and prices; Select room and complete booking; System checks room availability in real-time.
acceptance_criteria: Backend logic for room reservation is implemented and testable.
APIs and business rules for room reservation enforce validation and security requirements.
Data handling for room reservation is reliable and supports the required workflow.

FR-02.title: Database Design for Room Reservation
FR-02.description: Design the data model and persistence strategy for room reservation. Define entities, relationships, indexes, retention rules, and migration changes needed to store and query the workflow reliably.
acceptance_criteria: The data model for room reservation supports the required workflow.
Relationships, constraints, and indexes for room reservation are defined correctly.
Schema changes for room reservation can be applied safely in target environments.

FR-02.title: DevOps Setup for Room Reservation
FR-02.description: Set up the operational support for room reservation. Configure deployment settings, secrets, background jobs, monitoring, alerting, backup, restore, or recovery controls needed for the feature to run safely in target environments.
acceptance_criteria: Operational setup for room reservation covers deployment, configuration, and environment readiness.
Monitoring, alerting, backup, or recovery controls relevant to room reservation are in place and verifiable.
The runtime behavior of room reservation can be observed, supported, and recovered in target environments.

FR-02.title: Testing Room Reservation Functionality
FR-02.description: Create and execute tests for room reservation. Cover the main success flows, failure scenarios, permission checks, validation rules, integrations, and operational edge cases described in the SRS so the implementation is safe to release.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover the main success and failure scenarios for room reservation.
Security, validation, and permission checks for room reservation are verified.
Regression coverage exists for the most important room reservation behaviors.
